reason: The remediation involves modifying PAM configuration files (/etc/pam.d/system-auth) and SSSD configuration. While this is a standard hardening pattern, improper configuration of PAM modules (specifically adding 'try_cert_auth' or 'require_cert_auth') carries a high risk of locking users out of the system if smart card hardware or middleware is not correctly configured or available.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Potential for user lockout if PAM configuration is incorrect; Dependency on functional smart card middleware/drivers; Changes to authentication flow (PAM)
